title: Brook Steals the Road Poneglyph Copy
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Judge, Luffy, Sanji, Pudding, Big Mom as Sanji learns the truth about Pudding and Big Mom’s plan while the crew looks for a way out.
scene: The truth behind Pudding and Big Mom’s plan breaks Sanji’s hope, while the crew gathers critical information and allies.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I ended up making it the way I normally do!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What the hell am I doing?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All of these are just their favorite foods...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I have been looking for a

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was short, but it was a fulfilling life.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: luffy and the others can make it out of here on their own.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Every last soldier of the evil Vinsmoke will die! As will I.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All will go according to big mom's plans. It's for the best. We can't afford to rub her the wrong way...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Supposed to be asleep in your room?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then I'm going to starve to death right here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: What was that noise just now?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Sounded like a wall getting knocked down!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: What the hell are you doing here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Hold it right there, damn it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: where he heads, he already knows...

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Betrayal Revealed storyline with 38 dialogue beats. Pudding’s deception and Big Mom’s intentions become clear, changing the rescue from infiltration to survival.
